heading: Office of Elementary and Secondary Education; inclusion of Office of Migrant Education
label: 3414 Office of Elementary and Secondary Education; inclusion of Office of Migrant Education
text: There shall be in the Department an Office of Elementary and Secondary Education, to be administered by the Assistant Secretary for Elementary and Secondary Education appointed under . The Assistant Secretary shall administer such functions affecting elementary and secondary education, both public and private, as the Secretary shall delegate. There shall be within the Office of Elementary and Secondary Education and directly under the supervision of the Assistant Secretary for Elementary and Secondary Education, an Office of Migrant Education, which shall be responsible for the administration of programs established by part C of title I of the Elementary and Secondary Education Act of 1965 [ et seq.] and by subpart 5 of part A of title IV of the Higher Education Act of 1965 [].section 3412(b) of this title20 U.S.C. 639120 U.S.C. 1070d–2
notes: References in TextThe Elementary and Secondary Education Act of 1965, referred to in text, is , , . For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub.
